site.name: SpeakLab
site.location: Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore

instructor.name: Sir Shayan
instructor.bio: An experienced English communication coach with a passion for helping students unlock their true potential. His dynamic teaching style combines theory with real-world practice, making every class engaging and impactful.

curriculum.title: Spoken English Mastery
curriculum.desc: Speak naturally and fluently in any situation without hesitation.

curriculum.title: Public Speaking & Confidence
curriculum.desc: Overcome stage fright and build unshakeable self-belief.

curriculum.title: Professional Communication
curriculum.desc: Tailored soft skills and etiquette for success in the corporate world.

curriculum.title: Interview Preparation
curriculum.desc: Hands-on practice to help you ace your job interviews.

curriculum.title: Critical Thinking & Expression
curriculum.desc: Learn to think on your feet and respond intelligently.

faqs.q: What is the Communication & Confidence Program?
faqs.a: It is an intensive 8-week English communication course held at Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore. Classes run Monday, Wednesday, and Friday from 5:00 PM to 6:45 PM — 24 total sessions.

faqs.q: Who is this program designed for?
faqs.a: Students, fresh graduates, and young professionals who want to speak English confidently in interviews, workplaces, and everyday conversations.

faqs.q: What will I learn in 8 weeks?
faqs.a: Spoken English, Professional Communication, Public Speaking, Interview Preparation, Critical Thinking, and Confidence Building.

faqs.q: How much does the program cost?
faqs.a: Special June Batch fee is PKR 15,000 (regular PKR 20,000). Secure your seat with PKR 5,000 registration fee, balance due by 5th of next month.
Only 20 seats are available for the June Batch. Once filled, registration closes.
Click Enroll Now, fill in your details, and our team will contact you on WhatsApp to confirm your seat and share payment details.

faqs.q: Will this program help me in job interviews?
faqs.a: Yes. Interview Preparation is a core module. You will practice real scenarios and develop the communication skills employers look for.

faqs.q: Is the class online or in-person?
faqs.a: Classes are in-person at Punjab Tianjin University of Technology, Lahore.
You can reach us at support@speaklab.pk and our team will respond within 24 hours.
Yes. Pay PKR 5,000 to reserve your seat, remaining PKR 10,000 due by 5th of next month.
